name: superpowers-codex
description: Codex-only workflow and skills library forked from obra/superpowers.

interface.longDescription: A Codex-specific fork of obra/superpowers focused on design, planning, execution, debugging, and review workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use Superpowers for Codex when a design, plan, execution, debugging, review, verification, or branch-finish workflow applies. The package follows a Natural-Language Agent Harness model: read docs/language-contracts/ for human-facing workflow authority, and treat tools/scripts/tests as evidence or explicit code authority only when classified.
